Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Reader burn]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Reader burn is a painful sensation caused by overusing Reading powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Reader burn is a painful sensation experienced by Readers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Reader burn is a condition that makes active Reading difficult.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Reader burn is a side effect of using Reader powers too much.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Reader burn is a phenomenon that can distract Lucan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Reader burn is a phenomenon that can distract Lucan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Lucan experiences a Reader burn in his head.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — Calder experiences the beginnings of Reader burn in his head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 18''' — Focusing on a Reader's trance can cause a sensation known as Reader burn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Reader burn is a weakness that occurs when a Reader's ability outpaces their constitution.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Lucan's experience was not yet full-on Reader burn.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
